# Delivery Checklist

## Step 1: Intake

- [ ] Client goals confirmed
- [ ] Data/files requested
- [ ] Scope approved

## Step 2: Build

- [ ] Data processed
- [ ] AI outputs generated
- [ ] Draft outputs reviewed

## Step 3: QA

- [ ] Business QA
- [ ] Data QA
- [ ] AI QA
- [ ] Compliance QA

## Step 4: Delivery

- [ ] Report finalized
- [ ] Proof pack generated
- [ ] Handoff completed
- [ ] Upsell presented
